name: Official Maggie Hassan Headquarters
subject: FWD: someone I met recently
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hey there -- just wanted to make sure you saw this note from Debra Messing.
She's absolutely right -- Maggie Hassan's race here in New Hampshire is one of the closest and most important in the country, because the outcome will almost certainly decide control of the Senate and the future of the Supreme Court.
But corporate special interests have spent $40 million and counting on misleading ads to make sure Maggie doesn't win, and the best way for us to set the record straight is with help from grassroots supporters like you.
**[Please, donate $3 or whatever works for you directly to Maggie's campaign so that together we can take back the Senate and secure the future of the Supreme Court.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd74a/2a380d31/119242a3/fa155e/1972169329/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYwOTA1X21lc3NpbmdraWNrX25oLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20160905_messingkick_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**
Thanks for all you do,
Team Maggie
_\-----------Original Message-----------_
On Thursday, September 1 at 7:43 PM, Debra Messing
<info@maggiehassan.com> wrote:
Hi there,
I'm Debra Messing, an actor and progressive advocate, and recently I was introduced to Governor Maggie Hassan at the Democratic National Convention's Women's Caucus in Philadelphia. She's fought to protect women's health care rights, ensure LGBTQ equality, and make college more affordable in New Hampshire -- now she's running for the U.S. Senate.
Her race is one of the closest and most important in the country, because the outcome will almost certainly decide control of the Senate and the future of the Supreme Court. **[Right now, right-wing corporate special interests are spending MILLIONS to stop Maggie, and she needs our help. If we're going to flip the Senate, secure the Court, and make real progress, she needs you to give $3 or more now.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd74a/2a380d31/119242a3/fa155e/1972169329/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYwOTA1X21lc3NpbmdraWNrX25oLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20160905_messingkick_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**
I'm struck by Maggie's powerful guiding principle -- that the more people we bring in from the margins, the more successful we are as a country. It's a simple, inspiring thought that we need to see more of in government.
But that won't happen if we don't act. Washington Republicans are doing everything they can to stop her, so it's up to you and me to help Maggie fight back. **[If you're with me, please donate $3 today to elect Maggie, take back the Senate, and get our country working again to do the greatest good.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd74a/2a380d31/119242a3/fa155e/1972169329/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYwOTA1X21lc3NpbmdraWNrX25oLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20160905_messingkick_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**
Thanks,
Debra
P.S. -- Isn't this photo from the DNC Women's Caucus fun? I can't wait to be able to call Maggie the next Senator from New Hampshire, but her race is going to be a tough one -- we can't take anything for granted. [**Will you donate $3 or whatever you can to her campaign so we can make sure she gets over the finish line?**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd74a/2a380d31/119242a3/fa155e/1972169329/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYwOTA1X21lc3NpbmdraWNrX25oLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20160905_messingkick_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")

name: Paul Ryan
subject: Your choice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Ryan, a joint fundraising committee authorized
body: Peter, On Thursday, only two months will stand between us and what could be the most impactful election of our lifetimes. But if you spend your day watching the cable news networks, you'd think the election is all but over. The pundits on TV are predicting a giant "Democratic Wave." Let me tell you this: They're wrong. Across the board, conservatives are rallying support in districts traditionally held by liberals. We're as confident as we've ever been about this election. But let me also tell you this. A LOT can change in two months. Elections are often won and lost by just a handful of votes. In many cases, just one extra door knock, television ad, or phone call could have made all the difference. That's why I need you to stand with me. Right here, right now. Are you ready for one last sprint to the finish line? name: Lindsey Graham
subject: I had to share this with you, Friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Graham
body:
Please watch this video for Kelly Ayotte's campaign | |

---
---
|
Dear Friend,

We all hate those over-the-top, false attack ads from D.C. special interest groups that try to pull the wool over voters' eyes.

My friend Sen. Kelly Ayotte, who is a strong conservative representing the people of New Hampshire, is being blistered on television by those ads. _Liberal groups have spent over $10 million in the last 6 weeks alone trashing Kelly with false attacks._

That's why I wanted to share this great new ad from Kelly that pushes back on the false attacks.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/37363026:stfT2ubyN:m:1:1284014958:FDBDADAAB8A22711E986E1D8D7BA1DD0:r)
_**[WATCH](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/37363026:stfT2ubyN:m:1:1284014958:FDBDADAAB8A22711E986E1D8D7BA1DD0:r): Kelly's batting down the false attacks and standing up for common sense **_

I've seen firsthand how Kelly steps up to the plate for our veterans, small businesses, hardworking families, and to keep our country safe.

Now, she's being challenged in a tough re-election campaign by the Democratic governor - the candidate handpicked by Harry Reid and Hillary Clinton, and she needs our help. **Republican control of the U.S. Senate will likely come down to her race.**

_**[Would you help put Kelly's new ad on the air in more areas?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/37363026:stfT2ubyN:m:1:1284014958:FDBDADAAB8A22711E986E1D8D7BA1DD0:r)**_ Her campaign doesn't have enough money to run the ad very long, and more voters really need to see how she bats away the false attacks with grace and humor.

| [** DONATE TO KELLY >>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/37363026:stfT2ubyN:m:1:1284014958:FDBDADAAB8A22711E986E1D8D7BA1DD0:r)
---

**[A donation today of $25, $50 or even $75 to Kelly's campaign would go a long way in supporting one of the most critical Senate races in the country.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/37363026:stfT2ubyN:m:1:1284014958:FDBDADAAB8A22711E986E1D8D7BA1DD0:r)**

The last time Democrats had control of the U.S. Senate, they gave us Obamacare and the wasteful $787 billion Obama stimulus. We can't afford for that to happen again!

Kelly Ayotte is one of the leading voices for common sense reforms in Washington, and we need her back in the Senate.

Please join me in supporting her today.

Sincerely,

Lindsey Graham
United States Senator

P.S. After being attacked relentlessly with _over $10 million of false attacks in the last 6 weeks, my friend Sen. Ayotte is pushing back with a great new ad_. **Please take and moment to watch it.** If you think it's as good as I do, please consider helping her keep the ad on the air by making a donation today. Thanks!

| Paid for by Team Graham

---

name: Justice for Governor
subject: What will Jim do?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Justice for Governor
body:
Labor Day marks the home stretch of campaign season.

As the 2016 election heats up, Jim Justice is traveling the state doing what the politicians have failed to do: listen to the people of West Virginia.

Politicians just love to talk and nothing ever happens, but Jim Justice is no politician; he's a businessman who gets things done. He's put out action plans to transform West Virginia.

Over these last two months of the campaign, Jim will be sharing more of his ideas to take this state where it's never been before. Jim doesn't do small; he thinks big. It's exactly the kind of leadership we need from our governor.

Below are the plans Jim's put forward so far. Follow the links below to learn how Jim will:

[Make Education the Centerpiece](https://act.myngp.com/el/6936020175196391424/6734148680695547904)

[Support WV Veterans](https://act.myngp.com/el/6936020175196391424/6806206274733475840)

[Reform Ethics In Charleston](https://act.myngp.com/el/6936020175196391424/6878263868771403776)

[Retrofit Old Buildings, Create Jobs & Cut Costs](https://act.myngp.com/el/6936020175196391424/6950321462809331712)

[Grow Our Tourism Industry](https://act.myngp.com/el/6936020175196391424/7022379056847259648)

[Combat the Drug Epidemic](https://act.myngp.com/el/6936020175196391424/7094436650885187584)

& his overall [Job Creation Vision](https://act.myngp.com/el/6936020175196391424/7166494244923115520)

Stay tuned for more ideas from Jim on how we can move West Virginia forward.

name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: Derek, you could get a signed copy of Hillary and Tim’s new book
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 2
body:
Hillary and Tim are releasing a book -- enter for a chance to win a signed copy | Derek --

I help lead the policy team here at HFA, and every single day, I'm proud that I get to work for Hillary Clinton and Tim Kaine -- two of the wonkiest leaders around.

That's particularly true today because they're releasing a brand new book: _Stronger Together_.

It’s chock full of detailed policy plans to address everything from climate change to criminal justice reform to creating an economy that works for everyone, not just those at the top.

If you want to know where Hillary will take our country as president, _Stronger Together_ is a critical read.

**[Today only, you could be one of five people to win a copy signed by both Hillary and Tim. Add your name now for the chance to win this piece of history from the 2016 campaign.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=19&ms=MjY0MjQ5MzcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgwODA0ODIzS0&mt=1&rt=0)

** Hillary’s vision is bold and comprehensive. She acknowledges how many of these issues are intersectional, presenting overlapping questions of class, race, and gender.

Comprehensive is actually an understatement -- according to the Associated Press, we've put forth nearly 40 proposals, 65 policy fact sheets, and more than 112,000 words. The Trump campaign, meanwhile, has put forth only 7 proposals, totaling only 9,000 words. These numbers help highlight a fundamental difference between these two campaigns.

Hillary has pushed us hard to think of more and better solutions on every conceivable issue, including those not often at the top of the agenda for people running for president -- like making childcare affordable, tackling the epidemic of addiction, and improving our mental health care system. And Hillary sure keeps our policy team busy. She hears about problems while she's on the road talking to voters and asks us to help her identify concrete solutions that will make life easier and fairer for all Americans.

This book is the product of all that work, and it's the authoritative blueprint for Hillary’s presidency -- the written record of what she wants to work together on for our country if we win in November.

**Don’t miss your chance to win a signed piece of history from Hillary and Tim -- add your name now:** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjY0MjQ5MzcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgwODA0ODIzS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you,

Maya

Maya Harris
Senior Policy Advisor
Hillary for America

body:
| Peter --

Ohio will always be home to me. I grew up in Columbus, started my family here, and I’m proud to be a Buckeye.

Today I'm worried about our country and our state, and that's why I hope you’ll join me in supporting my friend, Rob Portman. Barbara and I have known Rob and Jane for years and we know how hard they work for Ohio.

[](https://www.robportman.com/watch_ohios_champion?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nicklaus_blast&n=1)
Rob is the real deal. He's making a difference in standing up for American manufacturing, and he’s fighting to strengthen our military to keep us safe.

Rob Portman is Ohio's champion. I’m happy to endorse and support Rob, and I hope you will, too. [Click here to watch the campaign’s latest TV ad](https://www.robportman.com/watch_ohios_champion?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nicklaus_blast&n=2).

Sincerely,

Jack Nicklaus [](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nicklaus_blast&n=3)[](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nicklaus_blast&n=4)[](https://www.robportman.com/watch_ohios_champion?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nicklaus_blast&n=5 "Donate Here!")

name: Steve Bullock
subject: this isn't a political issue -- it's personal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock - Democrat, P
body:
---
Friend, My wife Lisa and I both went to Montana public schools from kindergarten through 12th grade. Now we send our three children to public schools in Helena -- our oldest just started high school and the youngest is in fourth grade. To me, strengthening our public education system isn't a political issue. It is deeply personal; I believe a good education is one of our great equalizers.

**[Will you pitch in $15 to make sure I have the resources to win and continue to fight for our public education system?](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=7zXYgA%2BmwwVne7wq6FyX8uRQu7tQpwdm)**

I want every single Montana child -- including our three kids -- to have the opportunity to get the skills necessary to compete in a global economy and build a bright, successful future. It's why I've made record investments in public schools, frozen tuition at our universities and expanded access to workforce training. It's also why I'm so deeply concerned with Greg Gianforte's proposals.

Mr. Gianforte's approach would cut $30 million from our public schools in order to give tax breaks that benefit wealthy Montanans like himself and big out-of-state corporations. We've seen this happen in states like Kansas, and it has decimated funding for public education. It's just not right. I've prioritized fiscal discipline as governor so that we're able to invest in our public school system and provide our young people the tools they need to succeed.

I think that's a whole lot more important than gutting our state's budget for irresponsible tax giveaways. **[But I need you to pitch in to make sure our vision succeeds in November. Can I count on you to donate $15?](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=OegRyCcTUrVghvVSlNqqqeRQu7tQpwdm)**

Thanks,
Steve Bullock

You have my promise. I will fight for you. |

Peter, I am with you. I will fight for you. And I will win for you. This is my solemn pledge. But I can’t do it alone. I am humbly asking for your vote so I can be your champion in the White House. Please officially pledge your support to vote for me and Mike Pence this November. PLEDGE YOUR SUPPORT
As we enter the final two months of this election, we need the pledged commitment of EVERY single one of our supporters. Peter, you are the rock of this campaign. Without you, we never would’ve won the primary. And without you, we will not win again in November. Which is why I’m turning to you first. Unless we have the pledged commitment from our strongest supporters, we will not win over the hearts and minds of independent and undecided voters. And just like we brought so many new Republican voters into our Party, we will do the same in the general election. Believe me, it will happen. I will fight to ensure that every American is treated equally, protected equally, and honored equally. We will reject bigotry and hatred and oppression in all of its forms, and seek a new future of security, prosperity, and opportunity. Our message is the winning message. Our platform is America’s platform. Now please pledge your support to be there for me, Mike Pence, and the future of America on November 8 when we vote to take our country back. Thank you and God bless you, Donald J. Trump PLEDGE YOUR SUPPORT

name: Molly Keenan, jayinslee.com
subject: Jay gets it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Getting sick shouldn't set you back. | Dear Friend, I'm really proud of Jay. I'm proud of the progress we've made growing our economy, supporting our schools, and protecting our climate under his leadership. And I'm especially proud to be on Team Jay when I hear him talk about the importance of paid sick leave -- a critical issue for working people across Washington. You see, he supports requiring businesses to provide paid sick leave for their workers. In this day and age, that's not only important, it's not only the right thing to do, it's common sense. With unemployment down and our economy growing, hardworking Washington families and employers will benefit from providing employees with paid sick leave. **Can you pitch in and show Jay you 're standing with him as he fights for paid sick leave for all Washington workers?** _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [EXPRESS DONATE $10 »](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=OTQ1OTkwNgS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAwMDE5NTAwMQS2&mt=2&rj=MTAwMDE5NTAwMQS2&rt=0)

---|---
**[Or, donate another amount.](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=OTQ1OTkwNgS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAwMDE5NTAwMQS2&mt=2&rj=MTAwMDE5NTAwMQS2&rt=0)**
Knowing they have paid sick leave provides workers with a strong sense of security. It allows them to take time off when they get sick, or to care for a sick family member, while knowing they won't be penalized. And for employers, it builds a strong sense of loyalty and commitment among their employees. Turnover is reduced and workplaces are healthier.
Paid sick leave for workers is a win-win for employees and employers. And it's great for Washington.
So, Jay knows that it's a moral and economic imperative to give workers sick leave. And his opponent? Republican Bill Bryant is outspoken in his opposition to Initiative 1433 to raise the minimum wage and provide paid sick leave for every Washington worker. To me, that's just another example of how out of touch Bryant is with working families.
It comes down to this: Paid sick leave is just part of Jay's plan to help working families. From raising the wage to securing family leave -- Jay is a champion for working people in Washington.
While Jay is fighting for a stronger economy, and a better future for our state, Bill Bryant would force us to turn back the clock on all the progress we've fought so hard for.
That's why I'm so proud of Jay and to be on his team. I hope you are too.
Show Jay you're proud of the progress we've won, and we're continuing to fight for:
[**jayinslee.com/betterfuture**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTQ1OTkwNgS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAwMDE5NTAwMQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,
Molly
Molly Keenan
Deputy Campaign Director

| ** _IN CASE YOU MISSED IT_**
**PHIL: A CANDIDATE WHO CAN BRIDGE THE DIVIDE**
It’s rare today to see a candidate that appeals to people of all political stripes. But in Vermont right now, the crisis of affordability is a non-partisan issue and Phil Scott’s focus on the economic fundamentals is attracting support from Vermonters across party lines in the election this November.

The latest sign of a willingness to cross the aisle at the state level comes from Heidi Spear and Seth Henry, who penned an opinion piece that was published in the _Times Argus_ this weekend. In the article they wrote that while they’ll stay in the D column at the national level, they expect to support Independent and Republican candidates at the state level. They cite numerous reasons, notably that **Vermont Democratic leadership has spent well beyond what Vermonters are able to afford **for ambitious programs that didn’t yield results.

They write, **“In aggregate, the costs of the failure of our Vermont Democrats to effectively govern are staggering. State spending has increased by over $3,000 per year per household since Shumlin took office.”** Promising to vote for candidates that prioritize fiscal responsibility and affordability – cornerstones to Phil Scott’s platform – they continue, **“Vermont Democratic leadership won’t solve our problems when they won’t even acknowledge they exist** – let alone their instrumental role in creating them. **Allowing affordability and economic opportunity to be undermined by delusions of grandeur, ineffective governance and gravy for vested interests is _bad for Vermont_.**”

A lack of balance in Montpelier has produced expensive yet impossible policy proposals, increased taxes and fees by $700 million over the last six years, and eroded the state’s economic foundation. Throughout the primary and this general election, Phil is the only candidate who has said growing our economy and making Vermont more affordable are his top priorities.

To read the full article, click [HERE](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=4fcb025c87&e=19cebfe173).

body:
Democrats Attack Greitens Days Before Missouri GOP Primary

By Maggie Severns, POLITICO
7/28/2016 5:17 PM EST

A political group affiliated with the Democratic Governors Association is reserving ad time to attack GOP gubernatorial candidate Eric Greitens in Missouri, seeking to affect the race just five days before Republicans choose their nominee from a crowded field.

Two sources tracking media spending in the state said that Jobs and Opportunity, a 527 group funded by the DGA, has booked about a half-million dollars in broadcast TV and additional radio spending attacking Greitens. The DGA did not immediately respond to a request for comment.

The ad is set to start airing Friday. Audio, which a source said was from the ad, criticizes Greitens for accepting money from a donor accused of sexually abusing a woman.

"What does this victim accused of human trafficking have to do with your vote for governor? Well a man accused of abusing her for 13 years gave Eric Greitens $1 million," a narrator says in the ad. "While others returned his money, Greitens said he was honored to take it."

Greitens, a former Navy SEAL and political newcomer, has been picking up steam in the competitive GOP primary because of his charisma and status as an outsider. The ad is a clear indication that Democrats would rather not face Greitens in the general election. Polls have found the race between Greitens and the three other candidates extremely close, but a SurveyUSA poll released this week did find Greitens leading the pack with 25 percent, with opponent John Brunner behind him at 21 percent.

Missouri was the site of a notorious instance of Democratic primary meddling four years ago, when Democratic Sen. Claire McCaskill's campaign aired ads casting GOP Rep. Todd Akin as conservative before his Senate primary. Akin won the three-way Republican race and promptly imploded in the general election, losing to McCaskill by more than 15 percentage points.

The DGA tried to influence Republicans' gubernatorial primary in Colorado in 2014, funding a group that tried to boost conservative ex-Rep. Tom Tancredo. But the effort prompted a backlash and Tancredo ultimately lost the GOP primary.

The winner in the Missouri GOP primary will face current Attorney General Chris Koster, a moderate and rising star in the Democratic Party, in the general election.

name: Dan Parker
subject: Help workers & small businesses
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Evan Bayh Committee, PO Box 133 W
body:
| [ ](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a50471/7be36b49/1ef34316/78f88879/3505338046/VEsH/ "http://www.evanbayhforindiana.com/")
---
Friend -- Yesterday, on Labor Day, our country honored American workers.

But politicians in Washington aren't doing enough for workers, or for the businesses that employ them.**Evan Bayh will work to change that: His economic plan will help small businesses thrive and keep our jobs in Indiana.**

Small businesses employ 1.2 million Hoosiers and make up over 97 percent of Indiana's companies. When small businesses thrive, America thrives. That's why Evan will push to reduce the red tape for new small businesses and clear the way for successful businesses seeking to expand and create more jobs. **[Evan always has and will continue to fight for small businesses and workers. Will you pitch in $5 to help elect him?](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a50471/7be36b49/1ef34316/78f88878/3505338046/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bayh?refcode=20160906nd&amount=10")**

It's not enough to give lip service to workers and small businesses. **We need concrete, actionable plans.**

**And Evan has them:**
* He'll fight to increase access to capital for small business owners so that they can expand, and encourage long-term investments in new technologies and equipment.
* He'll work to incentivize opportunities for research and development, making Hoosier workers more productive and more attractive to employers.
* And he will push hard to close the loophole that gives companies tax breaks for shipping Indiana jobs to other countries -- **putting our workers first.**

**But before we can put this plan in action, we have to get Evan to the Senate.** **[Will you chip in $5 now to support Evan's campaign?](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a50471/7be36b49/1ef34316/78f88878/3505338046/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bayh?refcode=20160906nd&amount=10")**

Thanks,

Dan Parker

name: Brian Zuzenak, HillaryClinton.com
subject: Support Tim's record of equality!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 2
body:
| Derek -- When Tim Kaine moved to Richmond in 1984 to begin his career as a lawyer, the first case he took was on behalf of a woman named Lorraine who had been turned away from an apartment because she was black.

Tim won that case, and then he made fair housing a major part of his legal practice. He spent the next two decades fighting so-called “redlining” in Richmond -- the practice of refusing housing, financial services, or insurance to people of color.

Tim was one of the few attorneys in the state of Virginia to focus on the issue, and in 1998, he made history with the largest-ever verdict against an insurance company for discrimination against black homeowners.

For Tim, housing has always been a fundamental civil rights issue -- an example of how far we have to go on questions of justice and equality.

And in 2016, addressing fundamental questions about our civil rights as Americans is at the center of this election. Winning this campaign isn’t just about clinching the presidency -- it’s about standing together to make a statement about where we want this country to go.

Speaking out shows that you’re aware of the problems we still face in building a more perfect union, and that you’re in this fight for the long haul -- for all Virginians, and for all Americans. **Derek, will you add your name right now to say that you’re with Hillary and Tim in their fight to break down barriers to racial justice, equal opportunity, and fair treatment under the law for every American?**

[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjY0MzQzNzYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgwOTQ2MTk3S0&mt=1&rt=0) Thank you,

Brian

Brian Zuzenak
Virginia State Director
Hillary for America

---

body:
This is how Trump is building momentum. | Derek --

This morning, CNN released a new poll that showed Donald Trump up by two points nationally, and his campaign is already using that number to raise money.

This is how you build momentum. You find a poll that shows you with a lead (any poll!), use that poll to raise more money, spend that money to boost your numbers in the polls. Rinse, repeat.

This kind of strategy actually could work if we don't stop the Trump campaign in its tracks and regain the momentum in this race. **We’re counting on Hillary’s best supporters like you to step up and show which candidate's really got the most grassroots energy -- can you chip in right now? When you do, we’ll send you a free sticker as a thank you:**

Thanks -- now let's hustle.

Robby

Campaign Manager
Hillary for America
